title: salvia pratensis subsp. bertolonii
intro: Salvia pratensis subsp. bertolonii, also known as Bertoloni's meadow sage or Italian sage, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the mint family Lamiaceae, characterized by its distinctive purple flowers and aromatic foliage. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can help soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Salvia pratensis subsp. bertolonii include its ability to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce anxiety and improve sleep quality. Salvia pratensis subsp. bertolonii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
